hero.eyebrow: A&A Driving School · West Palm Beach & Florida statewide
hero.title: Florida driving courses and license help — in English and Spanish
hero.subtitle: From permit prep to ticket and license guidance, A&A Driving School helps Florida drivers and families find the right next step — with friendly support in English and Spanish.

showcase.title: Your Driving Plan
showcase.footnote: A simple, step-by-step path in English or Spanish

problem.title: Florida drivers shouldn't have to guess what comes next.
problem.body: Permit rules, ticket courses, and license steps can be confusing. A&A Driving School helps you understand your situation and find the right next step — clearly, and in your language.

cards.title: First-Time Drivers
cards.body: Not sure where to start? We help you find your course path and get ready for the permit test.

cards.title: Parents of Teen Drivers
cards.body: Step-by-step guidance for families through the permit, practice, and license process.

cards.title: Spanish-Speaking Drivers
cards.body: Full support in Spanish — clear explanations and help in the language you're most comfortable with.

cards.title: Drivers With Tickets
cards.body: Help understanding traffic-school and ticket-related course options and your next steps.

finder.heading: Not sure which course you need?
finder.body: Answer a few quick questions and we'll point you to the right option for your situation — first-time driver, teen permit, Spanish help, ticket course, or permit prep.

services.heading: What we help with
services.title: Help for the most common Florida driving needs.
services.subheading: A&A Driving School helps Florida drivers with course guidance, permit preparation, bilingual support, and finding the right next step.

items.title: Online Course Help
items.body: Guidance and study support for Florida driving courses, online and at your own pace.

items.title: Permit Test Prep
items.body: Practice questions and study help to get ready for the Florida permit test.

items.title: Help in Spanish
items.body: Explanations and support in Spanish, built in from the start — not an afterthought.

items.title: Teen & Parent Guidance
items.body: Step-by-step help for parents and teens preparing for the permit and license.

items.title: Ticket & Traffic-School Help
items.body: Guidance for drivers who need traffic-school or ticket-related course options.

items.title: Not sure what you need?
items.body: Tell us your situation and we'll help you find the right course or next step — in English or Spanish.

packages.heading: Popular driver paths
packages.subheading: Guided help for specific situations — from first-time drivers to Spanish-speaking applicants. Find the one that fits and request info.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1Body: Start from where you are — first-time driver, teen, ticket, or Spanish help — so we can point you the right way.
howItWorks.step2Body: We help match you to the right option: course guidance, permit prep, and bilingual support.
howItWorks.step3Body: Get clear guidance, study help, and friendly support in English or Spanish along the way.

whyUs.heading: Why choose A&A Driving School
whyUs.subheading: Simple, bilingual help focused on Florida drivers.

cards.title: Focused on Florida drivers
cards.body: Help built around Florida drivers, families, and first-time applicants.

cards.title: Real bilingual support
cards.body: English and Spanish help is part of how we work, not an afterthought.

cards.title: One simple path
cards.body: Course guidance, prep, and support in one clear, step-by-step flow.

cards.title: Friendly, no-pressure help
cards.body: Ask questions and get guidance — request info or message us anytime, no pressure.

local.heading: Based in West Palm Beach. Helping drivers across Florida.
local.body: A&A Driving School helps Florida drivers and families with bilingual course guidance, permit preparation, and support finding the right next step.
local.disclaimer: A&A Driving School provides driving course guidance and bilingual support. Some regulated courses may be offered through approved providers, and eligibility may vary. We are not affiliated with the Florida DMV/FLHSMV and do not guarantee specific results.

testimonials.heading: Made for real Florida drivers and families
testimonials.subheading: We focus on the people we help — first-time drivers, parents, and Spanish-speaking drivers who want clear, simple guidance.

items.quote: I wasn't sure where to start with my permit. Having someone explain the next step made it so much easier.
As a parent, I just wanted clear help understanding what my teen needs to do next.
Tener todo el proceso explicado en español, en un solo lugar, cambia completamente la experiencia.

finalCta.heading: Ready to find your Florida driving course?
finalCta.body: Tell us your situation and we'll help you find the right next step — in English or Spanish.
